title: Aureline internal RPC envelope
description: Boundary schema for the request, response, event, and error envelopes carried by the internal typed RPC transport. See docs/adr/0004-rpc-transport-and-schema-toolchain.md. The Rust types in crates/aureline-rpc are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool export that external readers (docs, audit, CLI, companions) rely on and that stays stable across per-method payload evolution.

envelope_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the envelope shape. The current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking envelope changes; additive optional envelope fields do not bump this version.

wire_protocol_version.description: Outer framing protocol identifier. Frozen at wire/1 at M0; a future wire/2 requires a new decision row.

encoding_id.description: Connection-level wire encoding id negotiated in the handshake. Frozen at aureline/bin/1 at M0.

trace_context.description: W3C-tracecontext-compatible trace fields. Every envelope carries this unchanged across the remote proxy seam.

trace_id.description: Lowercase hex of the 128-bit trace identifier.

span_id.description: Lowercase hex of the 64-bit span identifier.

parent_span_id.description: Lowercase hex of the 64-bit parent span identifier, or null when the span is a root.

flags.description: 8-bit flags. Bit 0 = sampled, bit 1 = debug, bit 2 = do_not_record.

oneOf.description: A workspace identity stable across renames.
Literal 'global' for supervisor control-plane methods, telemetry enrolment, and the capability-negotiation handshake.

workspace_scope.description: Every envelope declares exactly one scope. Services reject requests whose scope does not match their authority domain.

actor_class.description: Originator classification used by policy, audit, and tracing.

baggage.description: Bounded key-value map. Dropped at the remote proxy seam unless the connector policy explicitly whitelists keys.

contract_version.description: Semver contract version of the method. Additive-minor permitted within a major; breaking changes require a new major and a deprecation window in the method manifest.

idempotency_key.description: Caller-provided key for methods whose retry is observable. Consumers MUST dedupe on this key within the documented retention window for at-least-once deliveries.

delivery_mode.description: Declared at subscribe time for event streams; frozen for the subscription's lifetime.

error_class.description: Frozen error taxonomy. A class id MAY NOT be reused across concerns; the same split is shared with the Appendix B.2 CLI exit-code model.

retry_hint.description: Per-error retry posture: 'no', { after_ms: <u32> } for timed retry, or 'reauth_required'.

code.description: Stable per-class error code, dotted-lowercase. For example: 'vfs.path_denied'.

request_id.description: Unique per connection for the call's lifetime.

method.description: service.method identifier, resolved against the method manifest.

deadline_ns.description: Absolute deadline on the connection clock, in nanoseconds. 0 means no deadline and is only legal for unbounded subscriptions.

cancellation_channel.description: Per-request cancellation token. Echoed on all frames related to this request.

payload.description: Typed, method-specific payload. Opaque to this boundary schema; described per-method in the service manifest.

Progress.description: Streamed progress chunk; payload is method-specific.

terminal.description: True on the last response frame; false on progress frames.

server_hint_ns.description: Optional server-reported remaining work estimate; observability only.

subscription_id.description: Allocated by the service at subscribe time; used to cancel.

sequence.description: Per-subscription monotonic counter. Consumers gap-detect on this field.

kind.description: Payload kind id (for example, TaskStarted, BufferSnapshotDelta). Resolved against the method manifest.

schema_version.description: Per-payload-kind schema version. Additive-minor evolution; consumers preserve unknown fields.

instance.description: Instance identifier (host + pid + boot epoch) so consumers can distinguish producer restarts.

payload.description: Typed, kind-specific body. Opaque to this boundary schema.

allOf.description: at_least_once producers MUST carry idempotency_key so consumers can dedupe.

cancellation_channel.description: Cancellation token echoed from the originating request.

reason.description: Typed cancellation reason. Repeated cancels are idempotent; the transport reports one rpc_cancel_observed per request.
